title: viburnum recognitum
intro: Viburnum recognitum, also known as Maple-leaf Viburnum or Arrowwood, is a species of flowering plant in the honeysuckle family native to the southeastern United States. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, which help to treat various health issues such as wounds, fever, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Viburnum recognitum include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Viburnum recognitum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water or using a solvent like ethanol to extract the medicinal compounds.
